retrieved_result: Board-Certified Law and Legal Definition Board-Certified Law and Legal Definition Generally, the phrase ‘board certified’ means certification by a medical specialty board. Hence, the term ‘board certified’ is a term of art, typically understood to refer to approval by a designated group of professionals. In other words, board-certified mea
